query:
-- Clear modelRunAt for games where RL invariant is violated:
-- Case 1: home has -1.5 but modelHomeSpreadOdds implies P(cover) > P(home win) + 5pp
-- Case 2: away has -1.5 but modelAwaySpreadOdds implies P(cover) > P(away win) + 5pp
UPDATE games
SET modelRunAt = NULL
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-10'
  AND sport = 'MLB'
  AND modelRunAt IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    -- Home is -1.5 fav: P(home covers -1.5) must be <= P(home wins)
    (
      homeRunLine = '-1.5'
      AND modelHomeSpreadOdds IS NOT NULL
      AND modelHomeWinPct IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED) < 0
            THEN ABS(CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) / (ABS(CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) + 100.0)
          ELSE 100.0 / (CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED) + 100.0)
        END
      ) > (CAST(modelHomeWinPct AS DECIMAL(6,2)) / 100.0) + 0.05
    )
    OR
    -- Away is -1.5 fav: P(away covers -1.5) must be <= P(away wins)
    (
      awayRunLine = '-1.5'
      AND modelAwaySpreadOdds IS NOT NULL
      AND modelAwayWinPct IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED) < 0
            THEN ABS(CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) / (ABS(CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) + 100.0)
          ELSE 100.0 / (CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED) + 100.0)
        END
      ) > (CAST(modelAwayWinPct AS DECIMAL(6,2)) / 100.0) + 0.05
    )
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

-- Case 1: home has -1.5 but modelHomeSpreadOdds implies P(cover) > P(home win) + 5pp
-- Case 2: away has -1.5 but modelAwaySpreadOdds implies P(cover) > P(away win) + 5pp
UPDATE games
SET modelRunAt = NULL
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-10'
  AND sport = 'MLB'
  AND modelRunAt IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    -- Home is -1.5 fav: P(home covers -1.5) must be <= P(home wins)
    (
      homeRunLine = '-1.5'
      AND modelHomeSpreadOdds IS NOT NULL
      AND modelHomeWinPct IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED) < 0
            THEN ABS(CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) / (ABS(CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) + 100.0)
          ELSE 100.0 / (CAST(modelHomeSpreadOdds AS SIGNED) + 100.0)
        END
      ) > (CAST(modelHomeWinPct AS DECIMAL(6,2)) / 100.0) + 0.05
    )
    OR
    -- Away is -1.5 fav: P(away covers -1.5) must be <= P(away wins)
    (
      awayRunLine = '-1.5'
      AND modelAwaySpreadOdds IS NOT NULL
      AND modelAwayWinPct IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED) < 0
            THEN ABS(CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) / (ABS(CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED)) + 100.0)
          ELSE 100.0 / (CAST(modelAwaySpreadOdds AS SIGNED) + 100.0)
        END
      ) > (CAST(modelAwayWinPct AS DECIMAL(6,2)) / 100.0) + 0.05
    )
  );
